description_long: This is a tall, narrow cabinet with a rectangular footprint and a wood-textured finish in a muted grayish tone. The front face features a single vertical door panel with a small, round knob, suggesting access to internal storage. The sides and back are plain, with the wood grain pattern running vertically, and the top has a slightly protruding lip, giving it a subtle decorative edge. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from engineered wood or laminate, with a solid, sturdy build suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, hallways, or offices. Its height and slim profile make it ideal for storing items in tight spaces without occupying much floor area. The overall design is modern and functional, with no visible glass panels or open shelving.
description: Tall, narrow cabinet with a gray wood-textured finish, single door, and small round knob. Modern, functional design with a slightly protruding top edge.
description_view_0: Front view shows the plain door panel with a small round knob near the right edge.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the vertical wood grain and the protruding top lip, with no visible hardware.
description_view_2: Back view displays a continuous wood-textured panel with no openings or hardware.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the wood grain and top lip, with a slight hint of the knob visible.
